subject: [SO] Use common secret template in so-mariadb
commit_message:
[SO] Use common secret template in so-mariadb

Use common secrete template in so-mariadb component.
For now passwords are stil hardcoded but this will be removed in
further commits.

Issue-ID: OOM-2328
Signed-off-by: Krzysztof Opasiak <k.opasiak@samsung.com>
Change-Id: I70b13b14d0ddad8913f45c7cabed0c0d221d0005

entries.message: Uploaded patch set 1.

Patch Set 2:

I'm digging around this dcae issue
interesting thing is that when I tried to delete onap-dcaegen2 I got such error:
Error: Job.batch "onap-dcae-cloudify-manager-map[]-cleanup" is invalid: [metadata.name: Invalid value: "onap-dcae-cloudify-manager-map[]-cleanup": a DNS-1123 subdomain must consist of lower case alphanumeric characters, '-' or '.', and must start and end with an alphanumeric character (e.g. 'example.com', regex used for validation is '[a-z0-9]([-a-z0-9]*[a-z0-9])?(\.[a-z0-9]([-a-z0-9]*[a-z0-9])?)*'), spec.template.labels: Invalid value: "onap-dcae-cloudify-manager-map[]-cleanup": a valid label must be an empty string or consist of alphanumeric characters, '-', '_' or '.', and must start and end with an alphanumeric character (e.g. 'MyValue',  or 'my_value',  or '12345', regex used for validation is '(([A-Za-z0-9][-A-Za-z0-9_.]*)?[A-Za-z0-9])?')

Patch Set 2:

@Sylvain
So I've played a little bit with the deployment on gating 1 that was previously failing and I've been able to delete failed onap-dcaegen2 and replace it and this time everything went up well.
So I have 2 theories:
1) There is sth in some magic override that I didn't used
2) We have some interference with a review that modified our _name.tpl file. So for me the error which I got at the deletion looks like someone messed up our common.fullname template and it happen at some point in one of reviews. I expect that for some reason that package may got cached in the CI system especially that deployments on azure seems to be all fine
